allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5]; print\(keys\); print\(json.dumps\(d[keys[0]], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d[0], indent=2\) if isinstance\(d, list\) else list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")
